response.original_title: Blades of the Guardians:  Wind Rises in the Desert 2026
response.overview: Blades of the Guardians: Wind Rises in the Desert (鏢人：風起大漠) is an epic 2026 Chinese wuxia film directed by legendary action choreographer Yuen Woo-ping. Based on the popular manhua Biao Ren, the movie follows a bounty hunter protecting a wanted man on a perilous desert journey, sparking a deadly, multi-faction chase
response.title: Blades of the Guardians:  Wind Rises in the Desert 2026
